calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-05-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to all Counsel and Parties in Propria Persona as to why this matter should not be dismissed pursuant to C.C.P. Section 583.360 for failure to comply with C.C.P. Section 583.310 is heard this day. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to C.C.P. Section 583.360 for failure to comply with C.C.P. Sections 583.310. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR#7156. (212)
